thriller.visual_grammar: shallow depth of field, tight framing, rack focus on threat, desaturated or cool grade
thriller.pacing: slow burn to sudden violence, holds longer than comfortable, quiet before storm
thriller.camera: motivated handheld in action, locked down in suspense, POV to create identification
thriller.performance: menace, controlled affect, subtext dense, stillness as threat
thriller.lighting: hard single key, chiaroscuro, practical-heavy, shadow conceals

drama.visual_grammar: medium and close coverage, OTS dialogue, motivated camera, natural light preferred
drama.pacing: scene-driven, emotional beats respected, pauses earn weight
drama.camera: steadicam for intimacy, crane for release, handheld for breakdown moments
drama.performance: stanislavski or meisner, emotional truth, naturalistic
drama.lighting: golden hour, practical + soft key, three-point for classical coverage

action.visual_grammar: dynamic angles, handheld in combat, wide for choreography, ECU for impact
action.pacing: fast cut in action, longer shots in setup, rhythm builds to climax
action.camera: Steadicam hero walk, crane for scale, Dutch angle for chaos, POV for impact
action.performance: physical precision, commitment, body over voice, presence over psychology
action.lighting: high contrast, motivated naturalistic in drama scenes, dramatic in action

horror.visual_grammar: negative space, off-center framing, slow reveal, Dutch angle, wide lens distortion
horror.pacing: long holds, jump scare rhythm subverted, dread through sound design gaps
horror.camera: low angle, canted, POV as vulnerability, wide lens warps space
horror.performance: fear physicality, primal response, body language leads, vocalization restrained
horror.lighting: practical only, chiaroscuro extreme, underexpose, light from below

romance.visual_grammar: soft focus, golden light, two-shot intimacy, rack focus on eyes
romance.pacing: linger on texture, slow push-in at emotional peak, breath-matched cuts
romance.camera: handheld for spontaneity, dolly-in for revelation, OTS for tension before kiss
romance.performance: meisner presence, listening dominant, restraint before release, desire in eyes not dialogue
romance.lighting: golden hour, magic hour, soft key, warm practical, candlelight

crime_noir.visual_grammar: venetian blind shadows, low angles, wide lens claustrophobia, wet streets reflecting neon
crime_noir.pacing: unhurried reveals, long takes in dialogue, sudden violence, smoke in the light
crime_noir.camera: dolly slow through space, canted for moral rot, low angle for power, ECU on hands
crime_noir.performance: clipped delivery, subtext maximum, stillness, economy — every word costs something
crime_noir.lighting: hard single source, neon color, venetian stripe, pools of light in dark

sci_fi.visual_grammar: wide negative space, scale shots, practical effects grounded, sterile vs organic contrast
sci_fi.pacing: awe and dread alternating, long establishing of world before character
sci_fi.camera: crane for scale, Villeneuve-wide, Steadicam through corridors, clinical locked
sci_fi.performance: physical_theatre + method hybrid, alien physicality, constrained affect
sci_fi.lighting: cool blue, practical tech sources, contrast warm/cold, sterile high-key to chiaroscuro
